hooks.command: "{{ python }}" "{{ project }}/.agents/guard-runtime/hook_event_adapter.py" codex --project "{{ project }}" --profile {{ guard_profile_id }} --codex-event UserPromptSubmit
"{{ python }}" "{{ project }}/.agents/guard-runtime/hook_event_adapter.py" codex --project "{{ project }}" --profile {{ guard_profile_id }} --codex-event SubagentStart
"{{ python }}" "{{ project }}/.agents/guard-runtime/hook_event_adapter.py" codex --project "{{ project }}" --profile {{ guard_profile_id }} --codex-event SubagentStop
"{{ python }}" "{{ project }}/.agents/guard-runtime/hook_event_adapter.py" codex --project "{{ project }}" --profile {{ guard_profile_id }} --codex-event PreToolUse
"{{ python }}" "{{ project }}/.agents/guard-runtime/hook_event_adapter.py" codex --project "{{ project }}" --profile {{ guard_profile_id }} --codex-event PostToolUse
